title: Titans table tennis club qualifies for SA champs
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Titans Table Tennis...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Titans Table Tennis Academy of Knysna recently qualified for the 2025 South African National Table Tennis Championships.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Titans Table Tennis Academy of Knysna recently qualified for the 2025 South African National Table Tennis Championships."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The championships are currently taking place in Durban (from 4 to 9 October) and features top players from every province competing for national glory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beyond the medals and titles, the event serves as a key pathway to selection for the South African national teams.","html":"Beyond the medals and titles, the event serves as a key pathway to selection for the South African national teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team earned their place at the event after impressive performances during the regional trials held in Mossel Bay earlier this year.","html":"The team earned their place at the event after impressive performances during the regional trials held in Mossel Bay earlier this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Representing the academy at the championships are Taylor Ruiters, Jae-Leigh Hoffman, Irisha Pedro, Delzanthy Pedro, Cassie Stevens, Kai Windvogel, Marquin Kayser, and Deveigon Williams, under their coach, Llewellyn van Rooyen.","html":"Representing the academy at the championships are Taylor Ruiters, Jae-Leigh Hoffman, Irisha Pedro, Delzanthy Pedro, Cassie Stevens, Kai Windvogel, Marquin Kayser, and Deveigon Williams, under their coach, Llewellyn van Rooyen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Rooyen expressed pride in his team’s dedication and progress.","html":"Van Rooyen expressed pride in his team’s dedication and progress."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Our players have worked incredibly hard to reach this level. Qualifying for the nationals is a huge achievement, and we’re excited to see how they perform against the country’s best,” he said.","html":"“Our players have worked incredibly hard to reach this level. Qualifying for the nationals is a huge achievement, and we’re excited to see how they perform against the country’s best,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Titans table tennis club qualifies for SA champs
